coverageNote: Measured on real held-out SAML-D alerts (Oztas et al., 2023), which carry transaction amount + counterparty — so FI-01 (fan-in) and ST-01 (structuring), structurally unmeasurable on SynthAML's amount-less features, are measured for real here and are the strongest detectors. Across SAML-D + SynthAML, 4 of 5 curated FATF/BNM cards are now measured (PT-01/FI-01/ST-01 on SAML-D, DA-01 on SynthAML); KYC-01 is the honest residual — no public dataset carries the declared customer profile it needs. Reports whose pattern matches no card (the coverage gap) score far lower recall, confirming patterns outside the 5-card KB are correctly not caught. The held-out slice is report-enriched (~60% positive) for measurement power, so accuracy and precision reflect that mix, not the real ~0.1% base rate — recall and per-typology recall are the mix-independent truths; lead with those.
